question: What are the names and lengths in kilometers of rivers that the Atbarah River flows into?
gold: MATCH (n:River)<-[r0:flowsInto]-(m0:River {name: 'Atbarah River'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.length_km

question: What are the names of mountain ranges?
gold: MATCH (n:MountainRange) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What is the area of the Barycz Basin in square kilometers?
gold: MATCH (n:DrainageBasin {name: 'Barycz Basin'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.area_km2

question: What are the names of lakes that the Xiang River flows into?
gold: MATCH (n:Lake)<-[r0:flowsInto]-(m0:River {name: 'Xiang River'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: List the names of drainage basins located in the same countries as Makalu, and for each basin, provide the number of such countries.
gold: MATCH (n:DrainageBasin)-[r0:locatedIn]->(m0:Country)<-[r1:locatedIn]-(m1:Mountain {name: 'Makalu'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num

question: What are the names and discharge rates in cubic meters per second of rivers that pass through Kazakhstan and flow into the Irtysh?
gold: MATCH (n:River)-[r0:flowsThrough]->(m0:Country {name: 'Kazakhstan'}),(n:River)-[r1:flowsInto]->(m1:River {name: 'Irtysh'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.discharge_m3_s

question: What are the names of rivers that are fed by rivers within the Lena basin, and how many such rivers flow into each of them?
gold: MATCH (n:River)<-[r0:flowsInto]-(m0:River)-[r1:partOf]->(m1:DrainageBasin {name: 'Lena basin'}) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num

question: What is the name of the shortest river that flows into a lake located in the People's Republic of China?
gold: MATCH (n:River)-[r0:flowsInto]->(m0:Lake)-[r1:locatedIn]->(m1:Country {name: 'People\'s Republic of China'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.length_km ASC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of rivers that flow into Dongting Lake, and how many rivers flow into each of them?
gold: MATCH (n:River)-[r1:flowsInto]->(m1:Lake {name: 'Dongting Lake'}) OPTIONAL MATCH (n:River)<-[r0:flowsInto]-(m0:River) WITH n, count(DISTINCT m0) AS num RETURN n.name, num

question: What is the difference in square kilometers between the area of Jordan and that of Paraguay?
gold: MATCH (n:Country {name: 'Jordan'}), (m0:Country {name: 'Paraguay'}) RETURN n.area_km2 - m0.area_km2 AS answer

question: How many lakes are either located in the People's Republic of China or have the Xiang River flowing into them?
gold: CALL { MATCH (n:Lake)-[r0:locatedIn]->(m0:Country {name: 'People\'s Republic of China'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Lake)<-[r1:flowsInto]-(m1:River {name: 'Xiang River'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)

question: What are the names and vertical depths of lakes situated in the People's Republic of China that are part of the Yellow River Basin?
gold: MATCH (n:Lake)-[r0:locatedIn]->(m0:Country {name: 'People\'s Republic of China'}),(n:Lake)-[r1:partOf]->(m1:DrainageBasin {name: 'Yellow River Basin'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.vertical_depth_m

question: Which ocean, the Atlantic or the Arctic, has a greater maximum vertical depth?
gold: MATCH (n:Ocean {name: 'Atlantic Ocean'}), (m0:Ocean {name: 'Arctic Ocean'}) RETURN CASE WHEN n.max_vertical_depth_m > m0.max_vertical_depth_m THEN n.name ELSE m0.name END AS answer

question: How many countries either contain the mountain Pik 100 years Russian Geographical Society or are traversed by the Dan River?
gold: CALL { MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:locatedIn]-(m0:Mountain {name: 'Pik 100 years Russian Geographical Society'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:Country)<-[r1:flowsThrough]-(m1:River {name: 'Dan River'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN count(n)

question: What are the names and areas in square kilometers of countries through which the Kyrtau River flows and in which the Narva basin is located?
gold: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:flowsThrough]-(m0:River {name: 'Kyrtau'}),(n:Country)<-[r1:locatedIn]-(m1:DrainageBasin {name: 'Narva basin'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name, n.area_km2

question: What are the names of countries where drainage basins are located?
gold: MATCH (n:Country)<-[r0:locatedIn]-(m0:DrainageBasin) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the names of mountain ranges that are part of the same range as Arkatag Shan?
gold: MATCH (n:MountainRange)-[r0:partOf]->(m0:MountainRange)<-[r1:partOf]-(m1:MountainRange {name: 'Arkatag Shan'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the names of drainage basins located in the same country as Keller Lake, sorted by their area in square kilometers from largest to smallest?
gold: MATCH (n:DrainageBasin)-[r0:locatedIn]->(m0:Country)<-[r1:locatedIn]-(m1:Lake {name: 'Keller Lake'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.area_km2 DESC

question: What is the name of the tallest mountain that is part of a mountain range which the Saser Muztagh mountain range is part of?
gold: MATCH (n:Mountain)-[r0:partOf]->(m0:MountainRange)<-[r1:partOf]-(m1:MountainRange {name: 'Saser Muztagh'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name ORDER BY n.elevation_m DESC LIMIT 1

question: What are the names of drainage basins that the Lukaya River or Lake Mweru are part of?
gold: CALL { MATCH (n:DrainageBasin)<-[r0:partOf]-(m0:River {name: 'Lukaya River'}) RETURN n, m0 as m UNION MATCH (n:DrainageBasin)<-[r1:partOf]-(m1:Lake {name: 'Lake Mweru'}) RETURN n, m1 as m } WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name

question: What are the names of drainage basins that have lakes located in the People's Republic of China as part of them?
gold: MATCH (n:DrainageBasin)<-[r0:partOf]-(m0:Lake)-[r1:locatedIn]->(m1:Country {name: 'People\'s Republic of China'}) WITH DISTINCT n RETURN n.name
